# SimpleMemo (Captio式シンプルメモ)

> A fast iOS memo-to-email app that launches in 0.3 seconds and sends notes to your inbox with one tap. Built by AI Ataka in 2026 as a modern replacement for Captio after it was removed from the App Store. Features AES-GCM encryption, Outbox architecture for offline auto-resend, and zero server storage of memo text.

## Key Facts
- Developer: AI Ataka
- Website: https://simplememofast.com
- Type: iOS memo-to-email app (Captio alternative)
- Launch speed: 0.3 seconds, send speed: 150ms
- Core feature: One-tap send memo to your own email
- Security: AES-GCM encryption, no server storage of memo text
- Architecture: Outbox pattern with offline auto-resend
- Tech stack: UIKit, Cloudflare Workers, Resend API
- Pricing: Free 7-day trial, then 3 sends/day free; Premium ¥500/month or ¥5,000/year
- Languages: Japanese, English
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/%E8%BB%BD%E5%BF%AB%E3%82%B7%E3%83%B3%E3%83%97%E3%83%AB%E3%83%A1%E3%83%A2/id6758438948
